name: Sort Tasks
author: l3ad3r1
description: Editor command that moves completed task-list items (- [x]) to the bottom, keeping everything else in order.
main: octo.registerCommand("sortTasks", "Sort tasks: done to bottom", function(t){ var lines = String(t).split("\n"); var done = []; var rest = []; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { if (/^\s*- \[[xX]\]/.test(lines[i])) { done.push(lines[i]); } else { rest.push(lines[i]); } } if (done.length === 0) { return String(t); } while (rest.length > 0 && rest[rest.length - 1].replace(/\s/g, "") === "") { rest.pop(); } return rest.concat(done).join("\n"); });
